The Opportunity

Why chargeFUZE?
Why now?

We're the #1 portable charging network in the US — and we're going hyperlocal. City Networks is our ground-level expansion push, and we need closers in every major market.

💰
Uncapped Commission
Tier A, B, and C placements pay $200–$400 per station. Sprint bonuses, leaderboard payouts, and quarterly multipliers stack on every close. No ceiling.
⚡
Zero Lift After the Close
You pitch. You close. Everything after — hardware, installation, maintenance, support — is fully handled. Your job ends at the yes.
🎯
2,500+ Pre-Approved Venues
Walk into your market with a ready-made target list. Hotels, gyms, bars, entertainment venues — every door is already pre-qualified.
🗓
Work Your Own Schedule
1099 structure. No quotas, no set hours, no micromanagement. Build the pipeline on your time and earn on every placement you close.

Open House Agenda

What happens
on the call.

01
The Network Story
We walk you through the chargeFUZE footprint — 3,500+ locations, 40+ states, the venues you already know. You'll see exactly where we're headed in 2026.
02
The Opportunity Breakdown
Commission structure, tier payouts, sprint bonuses, leaderboard rewards. No fluff — real numbers, real earning potential, real examples from current reps.
03
Live Q&A
Ask anything. How does onboarding work? What does a typical week look like? How fast do payouts hit? We answer it all live, no filter.
